metadata.description: Deep Suite — structured development, wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, document gardening, and harness diagnostics plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: deep-work
plugins.description: Evidence-Driven Development Protocol — emits envelope-wrapped session-receipt + slice-receipt + handoff + compaction-state (v6.6.1+)

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-managed markdown wiki — emits envelope-wrapped index.json (multi-source aggregator) + 5 envelope-aware markdown command sites (v1.5.0+)

plugins.name: deep-evolve
plugins.description: Autonomous Experimentation Protocol — emits envelope-wrapped evolve-receipt + evolve-insights + reverse handoff + compaction-state with identity-gated chain extraction (v3.3.0+)

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Independent Evaluator — emits envelope-wrapped recurring-findings.json + envelope-aware session-receipt consumer (v1.4.0+)

plugins.name: deep-docs
plugins.description: Document gardening agent — emits envelope-wrapped last-scan.json (v1.2.0+)

plugins.name: deep-dashboard
plugins.description: Cross-plugin harness diagnostics + suite telemetry — emits envelope-wrapped harnessability-report.json + envelope-aware collector + 16-metric aggregator (3 M5-activated: handoff roundtrip + compaction frequency/preserved-ratio) + JSONL/markdown/OTLP exporters (v1.3.1+)
